task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing the current directory changed to /home/ga/voting-app/

task_completion.description: Execute docker-compose to deploy the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing the execution of 'docker-compose up' or 'docker compose up' with output indicating that networks, volumes, and containers are being created or started

task_completion.description: Ensure all five required containers are running
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing the output of 'docker ps' or 'docker-compose ps' listing exactly 5 running containers corresponding to the services: vote, result, worker, redis, and db

task_completion.description: Verify the vote interface is accessible on port 5001
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:5001' (or 127.0.0.1:5001) and displaying the Example Voting App frontend (typically a choice between Cats and Dogs)

task_completion.description: Verify the results interface is accessible on port 5002
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:5002' (or 127.0.0.1:5002) and displaying the Example Voting App results dashboard (showing vote percentages)

integrity.description: Verify that Docker commands were actually executed and not mocked
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output should show authentic Docker daemon responses, pull/build progress bars, or standard container start logs rather than manually echoed text or simple text files.

integrity.description: Verify the web interfaces are loaded in a real browser via HTTP
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must explicitly show the 'http://localhost' URLs. It should not be a 'file://' path, a local HTML file opened directly, or a text editor preview.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the provided custom configuration rather than a default online version
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URLs must strictly show ports 5001 for the vote app and 5002 for the result app. If ports 5000 and 5001 are used, the agent bypassed the local docker-compose.yml.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application requires exactly 5 services to be running: 'vote', 'result', 'worker', 'redis', and 'db'. Note that this specific deployment uses custom port mappings: the vote interface must be on port 5001 (not the default 5000) and the result interface must be on port 5002 (not the default 5001).
